verses.text: Tua ahih ciangin Kumpinu Esther tawh an a ne dingin kumpipa leh Haman va pai uh hi

A ni nih ni, amaute in zu a nek laitakun kumpipa in Esther kiangah, “Kumpinu Esther aw, nong ngetnop bang ahi hiam? Nong nget khempeuh ka kumpi gam phelkhat dongin hong kipia ding hi,” ci kik leuleu hi
Tua ciangin Kumpinu Esther in dawngin, “Kumpipa in nong hehpih-zawh a, kumpipa in hoih na sak leh, kong nget kong thumnop thu pen keimah leh ka mipihte sihna tawh nong kipelhsakna ding ahi hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh kei leh ka mite suksiat ding, thah ding, beisakmang dingin hong kizuak hi. Kote, numei pasal a kibangin sal dingin hong kizuak hi leh bangmah ka pau kei ding hi; tua bang lel tawh kumpipa nawngkaisak taaklo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Kumpipa Ahasueras in Kumpinu Esther kiangah, “Hih banga gamtat ding a ngaihsun kua hi a, koi-ah om ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Esther in, “Hong langpang ka galpa! Hih migilo Haman!” a ci hi. Tua laitakin kumpipa leh kumpinu' mai-ah cihna ding theiloin Haman a om hi

Tua ciangin kumpipa a hehsa-in annekna pan dingkhia-in kumpi huan sungah a pai hi. Ahi zongin Haman ahih leh tua lai mahah omin Kumpinu Esther in a nuntakna a suahtaksakna ding a thum hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa in amah thah dingin a ngaihsutna a lungsim a thei hi

Kumpi huan panin a annekna mun uhah kumpipa hong paikik ciangin Esther' tutna lamah Haman na awn phei-in a om mu a, kumpipa in, “Ka innsung ka muhna nangawnah hih mipa in kumpinu hih ding ahi hiam?” ci hi. Kumpipa in tua thu a cih phetin amaute in Haman' mai puan a khuh uh hi

Tua ciangin kumpipa' na a sem innsungmangte lakah Harbona in, “Nidangin kumpipa' na hoihtakin a sem ngei Mordekai thahna dingin Haman mahmah in a phuhsak, pi sawmsagihnga a sang khuam pen Haman' inn-ah tumah-in om hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Tua tungah amah khailum un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Mordekai khailupna dingin a phuh khuam tungah Haman a khailum uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa' hehna a dam hi.
